---
title: 'Classroom Structure'
date: '2012-10-02T03:32:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Call To Excellence'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8563525237941029258'
blogger_filename: '/2012/10/classroom-structure.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Call To Excellence/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Notes'
---

Idea for Classroom Structure:<br />
<br />
Booklet divided into sections. Staple Bound booklet. Easy to write in, high enough quality to last and be kept after class.<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>Summary of that days topic</li>
<ul>
<li>Bullet Points and Fill in the Blanks</li>
<li>Pages for Notes</li>
<li>Reading: subject matter to read after that expounds on the topics covered.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Questions for Class Discussion</li>
<li>Questions for Self Reflection</li>
<li>Something to bring back to next class, something simple... a thought, an idea, a question to ponder... Take Aways... ??&nbsp;</li>
<li>Definition of Terms in the back of the book.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</ul>
